title: local-signing RSA-PSS clones signing key on every sign() call
description: LocalKey::Rsa variant clones the RsaSigningKey (and its inner RSA private key) on every sign() call to satisfy spawn_blocking's 'static bound. RSA keys are large (2048+ bit) and cloning allocates fresh memory each call. Should wrap the key in Arc<RsaSigningKey> so sign() clones the Arc (pointer copy) instead of the full key material. Ed25519 and P-256 run inline and don't have this issue.
